semantic.role: Test infrastructure mock LLM client simulating LLM provider responses for unit and integration testing.
responsibilities: Implements the LLMClient interface with mock behavior for deterministic testing scenarios
Parses rule block data from mock LLM responses to simulate architectural rule validation
Detects simulated architectural violations in mock responses for testing the rule engine
Provides configurable mock responses for testing prompt processing and validation pipelines
outOfScope: Real LLM provider integration or network communication
Production-grade prompt processing or rule enforcement
Persistent state management or caching of responses
invariants: Must implement the LLMClient interface from '../base.js'
Must not introduce real network calls or external dependencies
Must support deterministic mock response generation for test reproducibility

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a mock implementation of the LLMClient interface to enable deterministic testing of prompt processing and rule validation logic without external LLM dependencies.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Fix lint warnings and type errors in the mock client implementation as part of broader CI workflow improvements.

publicSurface: extractRuleBlocks(ruleData?: string): Array<{ id: string; severity: string; body: string }>
detectMockViolations(ruleData: string): Array<{ id: string; severity: string; reason: string }>

English.role: Test infrastructure mock LLM client simulating LLM provider responses for unit and integration testing.
responsibilities: Implements the LLMClient interface with mock behavior for deterministic testing scenarios
Parses rule block data from mock LLM responses to simulate architectural rule validation
Detects simulated architectural violations in mock responses for testing the rule engine
Provides configurable mock responses for testing prompt processing and validation pipelines
outOfScope: Real LLM provider integration or network communication
Production-grade prompt processing or rule enforcement
Persistent state management or caching of responses

Simplified Chinese.role: 测试基础设施中的模拟 LLM 客户端，用于在单元测试和集成测试中模拟 LLM 提供商的响应。
responsibilities: 实现 LLMClient 接口，提供确定性测试场景下的模拟行为
从模拟 LLM 响应中解析规则块数据，以模拟架构规则验证
在模拟响应中检测模拟的架构违规，用于测试规则引擎
提供可配置的模拟响应，用于测试提示处理和验证管道
outOfScope: 真实的 LLM 提供商集成或网络通信
生产级别的提示处理或规则执行
持久化状态管理或响应缓存
